Martin & Co.
One model end to end — a bipartite recipe builder with make-or-buy splicing, make-ahead with prefix-share batching, scheduled washing-up, the official-ragù blend check, ontology swaps, lane-change-aware multi-cook scheduling, a zoomable swimlane schedule graph, plan analytics, lot inventory, shopping, waste and nutrition.
integrated prototype · v5.2
Single shared engine. The schedule graph is now a swimlane diagram: labelled station lanes (board, sink, burner, oven, processor, fridge), aligned across days, with make-ahead holds drawn as dashed bars in the fridge lane and a 1–3× zoom. All numbers remain seeded estimates; keep-lives are food-safety-adjacent.
